'''wayaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycnometer|pycnometer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-y-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycnometer|pycnometer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wayaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæyæjæth|wæyæjæth]] || [[word:wæyæjæj|wæyæjæj]] || [[word:wæyæjæsh|wæyæjæsh]] || [[word:wæyæjæ|wæyæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wayayajath|wayayajath]] || [[word:wayayajaj|wayayajaj]] || [[word:wayayajash|wayayajash]] || [[word:wayayaja|wayayaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wayajath|wayajath]] || [[word:wayajaj|wayajaj]] || [[word:wayajash|wayajash]] || [[word:wayaja|wayaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wayafjath|wayafjath]] || [[word:wayafjaj|wayafjaj]] || [[word:wayafjash|wayafjash]] || [[word:wayafjaf|wayafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wayajatha|wayajatha]] || [[word:wayajaja|wayajaja]] || [[word:wayajasha|wayajasha]] || [[word:wayajaka|wayajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wayajath|wayajath]] || [[word:wayajaj|wayajaj]] || [[word:wayajash|wayajash]] || [[word:wayaja|wayaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wayajathal|wayajathal]] || [[word:wayajajal|wayajajal]] || [[word:wayajashal|wayajashal]] || [[word:wayajakal|wayajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wayajathatha|wayajathatha]] || [[word:wayajajaja|wayajajaja]] || [[word:wayajashasha|wayajashasha]] || [[word:wayajaka|wayajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wayajathan|wayajathan]] || [[word:wayajajan|wayajajan]] || [[word:wayajashan|wayajashan]] || [[word:wayajakan|wayajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wayajathaoro|wayajathaoro]] || [[word:wayajajaoro|wayajajaoro]] || [[word:wayajashaoro|wayajashaoro]] || [[word:wayajakaoro|wayajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
